name: The Synapse
subtitle: Where women connect mind, machine, and what comes next.
tagline: The Synapse is a conference for women shaping the intersections of AI, robotics, cognitive science, and consciousness -- where the future of intelligence is being co-created.

fiscalSponsor.name: Applied Love Labs
fiscalSponsor.blurb: The Synapse is an initiative of Applied Love Labs. Charitable contributions flow through ALL, which issues tax-deductible receipts in its own name.

mission: Inherited paradigms are no longer sufficient. Across AI, robotics, cognitive science, and consciousness, the questions that matter most require integration -- across disciplines, ways of knowing, and the full range of human intelligence. The Synapse is a gathering for the women at the frontier of each field: researchers, builders, practitioners, and leaders who are not waiting for permission to shape what comes next. This is not a conference about the future. It is the future, in formation.

principles.title: Love Over Ego
principles.body: We prioritize generativity over dominance, curiosity over certainty, and collective emergence over individual performance.

principles.title: Full Selves Belong
principles.body: This is not a space for curated expertise alone, but one that invites the fullness of who we are. Intellect, intuition, lived experience, emotion, and imagination are all welcome here.

principles.title: The Legitimacy of Multiple Ways of Knowing
principles.body: We honor analytical, intuitive, embodied, relational, and mystical forms of knowing as essential -- not peripheral -- to understanding reality.

principles.title: Designed for Cooperation + Reciprocity
principles.body: We move beyond win-lose thinking toward forms of cooperation that expand intelligence, creativity, and what becomes possible.

principles.title: Relational Becoming
principles.body: We understand knowledge, intelligence, and reality as emerging through relationship. Difference is not something to resolve, but something to work with in creating what does not yet exist.

principles.title: Women as Shapers of Mind and World
principles.body: We center the role of women -- and feminine ways of being -- in shaping minds, systems, and futures.

principles.title: Ethics as Foundation, Not Afterthought
principles.body: We commit to shaping technologies, knowledge, and futures in ways that are life-affirming, relational, and responsible to the whole -- expressed through structures and practices that prioritize participation, reciprocity, and shared benefit over extraction or control.

principles.title: Right Relationship with Power and Capital
principles.body: We recognize that funding and partnership shape what becomes possible. We engage capital in ways that are transparent, aligned, and in service of collective benefit, not control.

principles.title: Power Without Permission
principles.body: We reject inherited dynamics that require validation, gatekeeping, or hierarchy to act. Authority lives within us.

placeholderNote: Venue, participant roster, and session titles are placeholders. Applied Love Labs is confirmed as the host; Atlanta, October 9-11, 2026 and the curated group of 75 participants are confirmed. Ethos section is pulled from the committee's finalized A Living Ethic document.
